title: FormFieldDescriptor
description: Describes a single field in a form

id.description: Unique identifier for this field within the form

binding.description: Entity property name to bind to, or null for unbound fields. Supports dotted paths like 'Parent.Name' for related entity display.

enumType.description: Full enum type name for select fields

helpText.description: Help text displayed below the field

modeVisibility.description: Controls in which form mode the field is visible

validations.description: Form-level validation rules (override or extend entity-level validators)
